changes.oldValue: Derived from the external creative sprint doc: define the visual treatment, timing, and final copy for storyline-complete and reward moments so they feel meaningful without becoming a full game cutscene.
changes.newValue: Define the visual treatment, timing, and copy for the screen a player sees when they finish a character arc. Should feel meaningful without being excessive. Fits Saily's restrained puzzle-console aesthetic — think NYT Games end-of-day, not a full cutscene.

snapshot.title: Design the arc-complete reward moment for storyline milestones
snapshot.description: Define the visual treatment, timing, and copy for the screen a player sees when they finish a character arc. Should feel meaningful without being excessive. Fits Saily's restrained puzzle-console aesthetic — think NYT Games end-of-day, not a full cutscene.
